title: Sweet Crispy Moroccan Chickpea Bake
description: A sweet and comforting Moroccan-inspired dish featuring crispy chickpeas in a rich and aromatic sauce, perfect for a plant-based dinner. This bake combines the warmth of cumin and coriander with the sweetness of apricots and honey.

ingredients.name: honey
ingredients.notes: or maple syrup for vegan option

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, cumin, coriander, salt, and pepper.
Add the chickpeas to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
Spread the chickpeas on a baking sheet and roast for 30 minutes, or until crispy.
In a large skillet, sauté the chopped onion and minced garlic over medium heat until the onion is translucent.
In a blender or food processor, combine the sautéed onion and garlic, apricot jam, and honey. Blend until smooth.
In a large baking dish, arrange a layer of the roasted chickpeas, followed by a layer of the apricot sauce.
Repeat the layers one more time, ending with a layer of chickpeas on top.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the sauce is bubbly and the top is golden brown.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
